text: Friendly staff and a comfortable patio. Came back twice this week and the brunch held up both times.
Reliable when I'm in a hurry. The omelets are consistent and the coffee refills keep coming.
Decent food but a little pricey for the portion size. Fine once, probably not a regular stop for me.
Quiet study rooms are great, but half the computers were out of service when I visited.
Decent collection and helpful librarians, though the hours on weekends are pretty limited.
Pharmacist took the time to walk me through a new prescription. Fast, careful, and genuinely kind.
Gets the job done and prices are fair, but the line at peak hours can be rough.
Instructors are knowledgeable, but the rooms get crowded in the evening classes and it's hard to find space.
Lovely warm studio and a great vinyasa flow. The 6:30 AM class is a perfect way to start the day.
Solid schedule and welcoming community. Booking through the app is quick when I'm short on time.
Staff knew exactly which fitting I needed and saved me a second trip. Slightly pricey but worth it.
Charming shelves and a cozy reading nook, but the selection is thin and turnover is slow.
Good produce and a solid local section. The staff at the register always remember the regulars.
Best pancakes in the West End and bottomless coffee. Worth the short wait on a weekend morning.
Clean trails and plenty of shade. Great spot for a morning run before the crowds show up.
Nice open green space and well-kept paths. The playground area is a hit with families.
Interesting exhibits but it's on the small side, and a few displays clearly need updating.
Beautifully curated local history collection and free admission on Sundays. Spent the whole afternoon here.
Spacious room, gorgeous skyline view, and the front desk upgraded us without being asked. Will stay again.
House roast is excellent and the baristas remember your order. My go-to before a long workday.
Best latte in the neighborhood and a warm, welcoming space to settle in with a book. Highly recommend.

Took my mom here for her birthday and it did not disappoint. The steak was cooked perfectly and our server made the whole evening feel special. My go-to when something is worth celebrating in Hartford.
Came up here to mark a milestone and the 20th-floor views over the river were unreal. The tasting menu was worth every penny. Save this one for a night that really matters.
